extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won his 4th sprint of 2023 TDF after UNO-X led out KRISTOFF too early, Philipsen timing his final acceleration perfectly.
tactical_patterns: UNO-X led out KRISTOFF spectacularly but hit the front too far from line, allowing PHILIPSEN to time superior.
JUMBO-VISMA positioning VAN AERT in sprints despite no wins suggests team desperation for stage victory is affecting tactics.
VINGEGAARD's GC team actively positioning him in flat sprint finales indicates crash avoidance prioritized over energy conservation.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: Won all 4 pure sprint stages attempted, demonstrating perfect finish reading and no tactical errors.
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: UNO-X delivered him ideally positioned but lacked final acceleration to capitalize, suggesting declining top-end speed.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: JUMBO deploying full leadout train for him despite 0 wins shows team growing desperate for results.
